(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 1): b3 on table
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 6): b4-b9 stacked
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 7): b10-b16 stacked
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (clear b16)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (was on bottom)
      (clear b1)
      (on b1 b2)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (was on bottom)
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top (was on bottom)
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b4 on top (was on bottom)
      (on-table b16)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b4 b10)
      
      ;; Arm is empty

    )

)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20 b21 b22)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 5): b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on b5, b7 on b6, b8 on b7
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 14): b9 on table, b10-b22 stacked
    (on-table b9)

    (on b12 b11)

    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (on b21 b20)
    (on b22 b21)
    (clear b22)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 still on table (single block, no change needed in structure)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b3 on table, b2 on b3
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b8 on table, b7 on b8, b6 on b7, b5 on b6, b4 on b5
      (on-table b8)

      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b22 on table, b21 on b22, ..., b9 on b10

    )

  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20 b21 b22)
  (:init
    (arm-empty)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    (on b4 b5)
    (on-table b5)
    (clear b4)
    (on b6 b7)
    (on-table b7)
    (clear b6)
    (on b8 b9)
    (on-table b9)
    (clear b8)
    (on b10 b11)
    (on b11 b12)
    (on-table b12)
    (clear b10)
    (on b13 b14)
    (on b14 b15)
    (on b15 b16)
    (on-table b16)
    (clear b13)
    (on b17 b18)
    (on b18 b19)
    (on b19 b20)
    (on b20 b21)
    (on-table b21)
    (clear b17)
    (on b22 b22)
    (on-table b22)
    (clear b22)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      (on-table b3)
      (clear b3)
      (on b5 b4)
      (on-table b4)
      (clear b5)
      (on b7 b6)
      (on-table b6)
      (clear b7)
      (on b9 b8)
      (on-table b8)
      (clear b9)
      (on b12 b11)
      (on b11 b10)
      (on-table b10)
      (clear b12)
      (on b16 b15)
      (on b15 b14)
      (on b14 b13)
      (on-table b13)
      (clear b16)
      (on b21 b20)
      (on b20 b19)
      (on b19 b18)
      (on b18 b17)
      (on-table b17)
      (clear b21)
      (on-table b22)
      (clear b22)
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)
